```{r socasst-until}
m_fin_ben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_socasst == 1))
m_fin_noben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_socasst == 0))

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC All" = m_tqc_all, "TrustQC Ben" = m_tqc_ben, "TrustQC NoBen" = m_tqc_noben,
       "TrustCAN All" = m_tcan_all, "TrustCAN Ben" = m_tcan_ben, "TrustCAN NoBen" = m_tcan_noben,
       "Attach All" = m_att_all, "Attach Ben" = m_att_ben, "Attach NoBen" = m_att_noben,
       "FinSat All" = m_fin_all, "FinSat Ben" = m_fin_ben, "FinSat NoBen" = m_fin_noben),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Social Assistance: Days UNTIL Next Payment (1st)"
)
```

## Basic Income (Payment Day: 1st)

### Days Since Last Payment

```{r basinc-since}
# Trust in QC - Days Since
m_tqc_all <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df)
m_tqc_ben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_tqc_noben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Trust in Canada - Days Since
m_tcan_all <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df)
m_tcan_ben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_tcan_noben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Attachment to QC - Days Since
m_att_all <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df)
m_att_ben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_att_noben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Financial Satisfaction - Days Since
m_fin_all <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df)
m_fin_ben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_fin_noben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC All" = m_tqc_all, "TrustQC Ben" = m_tqc_ben, "TrustQC NoBen" = m_tqc_noben,
       "TrustCAN All" = m_tcan_all, "TrustCAN Ben" = m_tcan_ben, "TrustCAN NoBen" = m_tcan_noben,
       "Attach All" = m_att_all, "Attach Ben" = m_att_ben, "Attach NoBen" = m_att_noben,
       "FinSat All" = m_fin_all, "FinSat Ben" = m_fin_ben, "FinSat NoBen" = m_fin_noben),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Basic Income: Days SINCE Last Payment (1st)"
)
```

### Days Until Next Payment

```{r basinc-until}
# Trust in QC - Days Until
m_tqc_all <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df)
m_tqc_ben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_tqc_noben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Trust in Canada - Days Until
m_tcan_all <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df)
m_tcan_ben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_tcan_noben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Attachment to QC - Days Until
m_att_all <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df)
m_att_ben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_att_noben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

# Financial Satisfaction - Days Until
m_fin_all <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df)
m_fin_ben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 1))
m_fin_noben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_first_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_basinc == 0))

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC All" = m_tqc_all, "TrustQC Ben" = m_tqc_ben, "TrustQC NoBen" = m_tqc_noben,
       "TrustCAN All" = m_tcan_all, "TrustCAN Ben" = m_tcan_ben, "TrustCAN NoBen" = m_tcan_noben,
       "Attach All" = m_att_all, "Attach Ben" = m_att_ben, "Attach NoBen" = m_att_noben,
       "FinSat All" = m_fin_all, "FinSat Ben" = m_fin_ben, "FinSat NoBen" = m_fin_noben),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Basic Income: Days UNTIL Next Payment (1st)"
)
```

## Disability Pension (Payment Day: \~28th)

### Days Since Last Payment

```{r dispen-since}
# Trust in QC - Days Since
m_tqc_all <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df)
m_tqc_ben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_tqc_noben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Trust in Canada - Days Since
m_tcan_all <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df)
m_tcan_ben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_tcan_noben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Attachment to QC - Days Since
m_att_all <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df)
m_att_ben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_att_noben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Financial Satisfaction - Days Since
m_fin_all <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df)
m_fin_ben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_fin_noben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_since | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC All" = m_tqc_all, "TrustQC Ben" = m_tqc_ben, "TrustQC NoBen" = m_tqc_noben,
       "TrustCAN All" = m_tcan_all, "TrustCAN Ben" = m_tcan_ben, "TrustCAN NoBen" = m_tcan_noben,
       "Attach All" = m_att_all, "Attach Ben" = m_att_ben, "Attach NoBen" = m_att_noben,
       "FinSat All" = m_fin_all, "FinSat Ben" = m_fin_ben, "FinSat NoBen" = m_fin_noben),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Disability Pension: Days SINCE Last Payment (28th)"
)
```

### Days Until Next Payment

```{r dispen-until}
# Trust in QC - Days Until
m_tqc_all <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df)
m_tqc_ben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_tqc_noben <- feols(trust_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Trust in Canada - Days Until
m_tcan_all <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df)
m_tcan_ben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_tcan_noben <- feols(trust_can ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Attachment to QC - Days Until
m_att_all <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df)
m_att_ben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_att_noben <- feols(attachment_qc ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

# Financial Satisfaction - Days Until
m_fin_all <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df)
m_fin_ben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 1))
m_fin_noben <- feols(financial_satisf ~ prox_28_until | ID, data = df %>% filter(ben_dispen == 0))

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC All" = m_tqc_all, "TrustQC Ben" = m_tqc_ben, "TrustQC NoBen" = m_tqc_noben,
       "TrustCAN All" = m_tcan_all, "TrustCAN Ben" = m_tcan_ben, "TrustCAN NoBen" = m_tcan_noben,
       "Attach All" = m_att_all, "Attach Ben" = m_att_ben, "Attach NoBen" = m_att_noben,
       "FinSat All" = m_fin_all, "FinSat Ben" = m_fin_ben, "FinSat NoBen" = m_fin_noben),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Disability Pension: Days UNTIL Next Payment (28th)"
)
```

# Pooled Beneficiary Analysis (Personalized Proximity)

This analysis pools all beneficiaries together using a personalized proximity measure. For each beneficiary, we calculate proximity to their specific benefit payment day(s). If they receive multiple benefits with different payment dates, we use whichever payment is closest (minimum circular distance).

Payment day groups: - 1st: Social Assistance, Basic Income - 20th: Child Benefit - 28th: Housing Benefit, Retirement Pension, Disability Pension

```{r personalized-proximity}
# Calculate proximity to each payment day (vectorized)
calc_prox_vec <- function(survey_days, payment_day, days_in_month = 30) {
  since <- ifelse(survey_days >= payment_day,
                  survey_days - payment_day,
                  (days_in_month - payment_day) + survey_days)
  until <- ifelse(survey_days >= payment_day,
                  (days_in_month - survey_days) + payment_day,
                  payment_day - survey_days)
  circ <- pmin(since, until)
  data.frame(since = since, until = until, circ = circ)
}

prox_1 <- calc_prox_vec(df$day_of_month, 1)
prox_20 <- calc_prox_vec(df$day_of_month, 20)
prox_28 <- calc_prox_vec(df$day_of_month, 28)

df$prox_1_since <- prox_1$since
df$prox_1_until <- prox_1$until
df$prox_1_circ <- prox_1$circ

df$prox_20_since <- prox_20$since
df$prox_20_until <- prox_20$until
df$prox_20_circ <- prox_20$circ

df$prox_28_since <- prox_28$since
df$prox_28_until <- prox_28$until
df$prox_28_circ <- prox_28$circ

# Payment day groups
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    has_pay_1 = (ben_socasst == 1 | ben_basinc == 1),
    has_pay_20 = (ben_childbnft == 1),
    has_pay_28 = (ben_housingbnft == 1 | ben_retpen == 1 | ben_dispen == 1),
    is_any_ben = (has_pay_1 | has_pay_20 | has_pay_28)
  )

# Find closest payment day for each beneficiary
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    circ_1_adj = ifelse(has_pay_1, prox_1_circ, 999),
    circ_20_adj = ifelse(has_pay_20, prox_20_circ, 999),
    circ_28_adj = ifelse(has_pay_28, prox_28_circ, 999),
    min_circ = pmin(circ_1_adj, circ_20_adj, circ_28_adj),

    closest_pay_day = case_when(
      !is_any_ben ~ NA_real_,
      min_circ == circ_1_adj ~ 1,
      min_circ == circ_20_adj ~ 20,
      min_circ == circ_28_adj ~ 28,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    personal_prox_circ = case_when(
      !is_any_ben ~ NA_real_,
      closest_pay_day == 1 ~ prox_1_circ,
      closest_pay_day == 20 ~ prox_20_circ,
      closest_pay_day == 28 ~ prox_28_circ
    ),
    personal_prox_since = case_when(
      !is_any_ben ~ NA_real_,
      closest_pay_day == 1 ~ prox_1_since,
      closest_pay_day == 20 ~ prox_20_since,
      closest_pay_day == 28 ~ prox_28_since
    ),
    personal_prox_until = case_when(
      !is_any_ben ~ NA_real_,
      closest_pay_day == 1 ~ prox_1_until,
      closest_pay_day == 20 ~ prox_20_until,
      closest_pay_day == 28 ~ prox_28_until
    )
  )

# Verify
cat("Beneficiary counts:\n")
cat("Any beneficiary:", sum(df$is_any_ben, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Closest payment day distribution:\n")
print(table(df$closest_pay_day, useNA = "ifany"))
```

## All Beneficiaries

```{r pooled-all}
ben_df <- df %>% filter(is_any_ben == TRUE)

# Circular proximity
m_circ_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = ben_df)
m_circ_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = ben_df)
m_circ_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = ben_df)
m_circ_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = ben_df)

# Days since
m_since_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = ben_df)
m_since_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = ben_df)
m_since_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = ben_df)
m_since_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = ben_df)

# Days until
m_until_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = ben_df)
m_until_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = ben_df)
m_until_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = ben_df)
m_until_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = ben_df)

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC Circ" = m_circ_tqc, "TrustQC Since" = m_since_tqc, "TrustQC Until" = m_until_tqc,
       "TrustCAN Circ" = m_circ_tcan, "TrustCAN Since" = m_since_tcan, "TrustCAN Until" = m_until_tcan,
       "Attach Circ" = m_circ_att, "Attach Since" = m_since_att, "Attach Until" = m_until_att,
       "FinSat Circ" = m_circ_fin, "FinSat Since" = m_since_fin, "FinSat Until" = m_until_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Pooled Beneficiaries: Personalized Proximity (All)"
)
```

## Immigrant Beneficiaries

```{r pooled-immigrants}
imm_ben <- ben_df %>% filter(immigrant == TRUE)

# Circular proximity
m_circ_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_circ_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_circ_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_circ_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = imm_ben)

# Days since
m_since_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_since_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_since_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_since_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = imm_ben)

# Days until
m_until_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_until_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_until_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = imm_ben)
m_until_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = imm_ben)

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC Circ" = m_circ_tqc, "TrustQC Since" = m_since_tqc, "TrustQC Until" = m_until_tqc,
       "TrustCAN Circ" = m_circ_tcan, "TrustCAN Since" = m_since_tcan, "TrustCAN Until" = m_until_tcan,
       "Attach Circ" = m_circ_att, "Attach Since" = m_since_att, "Attach Until" = m_until_att,
       "FinSat Circ" = m_circ_fin, "FinSat Since" = m_since_fin, "FinSat Until" = m_until_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Pooled Beneficiaries: Personalized Proximity (Immigrants)"
)
```

## Non-Immigrant Beneficiaries

```{r pooled-natives}
nat_ben <- ben_df %>% filter(immigrant == FALSE)

# Circular proximity
m_circ_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_circ_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_circ_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_circ_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_circ | ID, data = nat_ben)

# Days since
m_since_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_since_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_since_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_since_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_since | ID, data = nat_ben)

# Days until
m_until_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_until_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_until_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = nat_ben)
m_until_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ personal_prox_until | ID, data = nat_ben)

modelsummary(
  list("TrustQC Circ" = m_circ_tqc, "TrustQC Since" = m_since_tqc, "TrustQC Until" = m_until_tqc,
       "TrustCAN Circ" = m_circ_tcan, "TrustCAN Since" = m_since_tcan, "TrustCAN Until" = m_until_tcan,
       "Attach Circ" = m_circ_att, "Attach Since" = m_since_att, "Attach Until" = m_until_att,
       "FinSat Circ" = m_circ_fin, "FinSat Since" = m_since_fin, "FinSat Until" = m_until_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "Pooled Beneficiaries: Personalized Proximity (Non-Immigrants)"
)
```

# Parallel Trends Charts (DiD Assumption Check)

This section creates parallel trends charts comparing beneficiaries vs non-beneficiaries around each payment date. For DiD identification, we need to see: 1. Parallel trends in the pre-period (similar slopes before treatment) 2. A potential discontinuity at the payment date

```{r parallel-trends-setup}
# Function to calculate relative day (distance from payment day)
# Wraps around month boundaries so day 28 is +8 from the 20th, not -8
calc_relative_day <- function(day_of_month, payment_day) {
  rel <- day_of_month - payment_day
  rel <- ifelse(rel > 15, rel - 30, rel)
  rel <- ifelse(rel < -15, rel + 30, rel)
  return(rel)
}

# Outcomes to plot
outcomes <- c("trust_qc", "trust_can", "attachment_qc", "financial_satisf")
outcome_labels <- c("Trust in QC Gov", "Trust in CAN Gov",
                    "Attachment to QC", "Financial Satisfaction")
```

## Payment Day 1 (Social Assistance / Basic Income)

```{r parallel-trends-day1, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
# Social Assistance and Basic Income pay on the 1st
df_day1 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    relative_day = calc_relative_day(day_of_month, 1),
    is_ben = as.numeric(ben_socasst == 1 | ben_basinc == 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(abs(relative_day) <= 10) %>%
  # Exclude anyone with ANY fixed benefit from non-beneficiary group
  filter(is_ben == 1 | ben_any_fixed == 0)

# Aggregate means by relative day and beneficiary status
agg_day1 <- df_day1 %>%
  group_by(relative_day, is_ben) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    trust_qc = mean(trust_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    trust_can = mean(trust_can, na.rm = TRUE),
    attachment_qc = mean(attachment_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    financial_satisf = mean(financial_satisf, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(is_ben == 1, "Beneficiaries", "Non-Beneficiaries"))

# Sample sizes
cat("Day 1 (Social Assistance/Basic Income) sample sizes:\n")
cat("Beneficiaries:", sum(df_day1$is_ben == 1), "\n")
cat("Non-beneficiaries:", sum(df_day1$is_ben == 0), "\n")

# Create plots
plots_day1 <- map2(outcomes, outcome_labels, function(outcome, label) {
  ggplot(agg_day1, aes(x = relative_day, y = .data[[outcome]],
                       color = group, linetype = group)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, 2)) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(label, " - Day 1 (Social Asst/Basic Income)"),
      x = "Days Relative to Payment (0 = Payment Day)",
      y = label,
      color = "Group",
      linetype = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
})

# Combine plots
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots_day1, ncol = 2)
```

## Payment Day 20 (Child Benefit)

```{r parallel-trends-day20, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
# Child Benefit pays on the 20th
df_day20 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    relative_day = calc_relative_day(day_of_month, 20),
    is_ben = as.numeric(ben_childbnft == 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(abs(relative_day) <= 10) %>%
  # Exclude anyone with ANY fixed benefit from non-beneficiary group
  filter(is_ben == 1 | ben_any_fixed == 0)

# Aggregate means by relative day and beneficiary status
agg_day20 <- df_day20 %>%
  group_by(relative_day, is_ben) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    trust_qc = mean(trust_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    trust_can = mean(trust_can, na.rm = TRUE),
    attachment_qc = mean(attachment_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    financial_satisf = mean(financial_satisf, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(is_ben == 1, "Beneficiaries", "Non-Beneficiaries"))

# Sample sizes
cat("Day 20 (Child Benefit) sample sizes:\n")
cat("Beneficiaries:", sum(df_day20$is_ben == 1), "\n")
cat("Non-beneficiaries:", sum(df_day20$is_ben == 0), "\n")

# Create plots
plots_day20 <- map2(outcomes, outcome_labels, function(outcome, label) {
  ggplot(agg_day20, aes(x = relative_day, y = .data[[outcome]],
                        color = group, linetype = group)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, 2)) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(label, " - Day 20 (Child Benefit)"),
      x = "Days Relative to Payment (0 = Payment Day)",
      y = label,
      color = "Group",
      linetype = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
})

# Combine plots
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots_day20, ncol = 2)
```

## Payment Day 28 (Housing Benefit / Pensions)

```{r parallel-trends-day28, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
# Housing Benefit and Pensions pay around the 28th
df_day28 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    relative_day = calc_relative_day(day_of_month, 28),
    is_ben = as.numeric(ben_housingbnft == 1 | ben_retpen == 1 | ben_dispen == 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(abs(relative_day) <= 10) %>%
  # Exclude anyone with ANY fixed benefit from non-beneficiary group
  filter(is_ben == 1 | ben_any_fixed == 0)

# Aggregate means by relative day and beneficiary status
agg_day28 <- df_day28 %>%
  group_by(relative_day, is_ben) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    trust_qc = mean(trust_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    trust_can = mean(trust_can, na.rm = TRUE),
    attachment_qc = mean(attachment_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    financial_satisf = mean(financial_satisf, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(is_ben == 1, "Beneficiaries", "Non-Beneficiaries"))

# Sample sizes
cat("Day 28 (Housing/Pensions) sample sizes:\n")
cat("Beneficiaries:", sum(df_day28$is_ben == 1), "\n")
cat("Non-beneficiaries:", sum(df_day28$is_ben == 0), "\n")

# Create plots
plots_day28 <- map2(outcomes, outcome_labels, function(outcome, label) {
  ggplot(agg_day28, aes(x = relative_day, y = .data[[outcome]],
                        color = group, linetype = group)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, 2)) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(label, " - Day 28 (Housing/Pensions)"),
      x = "Days Relative to Payment (0 = Payment Day)",
      y = label,
      color = "Group",
      linetype = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
})

# Combine plots
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plots_day28, ncol = 2)
```

# Difference-in-Differences: Child Benefit (Day 20)

This section estimates DiD models for the Child Benefit payment date (20th). - **Treated**: Receives Child Benefit (`ben_childbnft == 1`) - **Post**: Surveyed after the 20th of the month (`day_of_month > 20`) - **Fixed effects**: Individual ID + Wave - **Clustered SEs**: Individual ID

```{r did-day20-setup}
# NOTE: mprog_* variables are character (text labels when selected, NA otherwise)
# Need to check for !is.na() not == 1

# Create beneficiary variable with panel propagation
df <- df %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  mutate(
    ever_child = any(!is.na(mprog_childbnft)),
    selected_none_wave = !is.na(mprog_none)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    ben_childbnft = case_when(
      selected_none_wave ~ 0,
      ever_child ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

# Create DiD variables
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    # Post = surveyed after the 20th
    post_20 = as.numeric(day_of_month > 20),
    # Treated = receives child benefit
    treated_child = as.numeric(ben_childbnft == 1),
    # Interaction
    treat_post_child = treated_child * post_20
  )

# Check distribution
cat("Post (after 20th) distribution:\n")
table(df$post_20, useNA = "ifany")
cat("\nTreated (Child Benefit) distribution:\n")
table(df$treated_child, useNA = "ifany")
cat("\n2x2 Table:\n")
table(Treated = df$treated_child, Post = df$post_20)
```

## Full Sample DiD

```{r did-day20-full}
# Full sample DiD models
# Specification: outcome ~ treated * post | ID + wave, cluster = ~ID

m_full_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                    data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                     data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                    data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                    data = df, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_full_tqc, "Trust CAN" = m_full_tcan,
       "Attachment QC" = m_full_att, "Financial Sat" = m_full_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - Full Sample"
)
```

## Temporal Subsets

### ±10 Days Window

```{r did-day20-10days}
# Subset to ±10 days from the 20th
df_10d <- df %>%
  filter(day_of_month >= 10 & day_of_month <= 30)

cat("±10 days window (days 10-30): n =", nrow(df_10d), "\n")

m_10d_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                   data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                    data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                   data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                   data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_10d_tqc, "Trust CAN" = m_10d_tcan,
       "Attachment QC" = m_10d_att, "Financial Sat" = m_10d_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±10 Days Window"
)
```

### ±5 Days Window

```{r did-day20-5days}
# Subset to ±5 days from the 20th
df_5d <- df %>%
  filter(day_of_month >= 15 & day_of_month <= 25)

cat("±5 days window (days 15-25): n =", nrow(df_5d), "\n")

m_5d_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                   data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_5d_tqc, "Trust CAN" = m_5d_tcan,
       "Attachment QC" = m_5d_att, "Financial Sat" = m_5d_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±5 Days Window"
)
```

### ±3 Days Window

```{r did-day20-3days}
# Subset to ±3 days from the 20th
df_3d <- df %>%
  filter(day_of_month >= 17 & day_of_month <= 23)

cat("±3 days window (days 17-23): n =", nrow(df_3d), "\n")

m_3d_tqc <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_tcan <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                   data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_att <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_fin <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID + wave,
                  data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_3d_tqc, "Trust CAN" = m_3d_tcan,
       "Attachment QC" = m_3d_att, "Financial Sat" = m_3d_fin),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±3 Days Window"
)
```

## Individual FE Only (No Wave FE)

Same DiD models but with individual fixed effects only (no wave fixed effects).

### Full Sample (Individual FE)

```{r did-day20-full-id-only}
m_full_tqc_id <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                       data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_tcan_id <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                        data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_att_id <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                       data = df, cluster = ~ID)
m_full_fin_id <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                       data = df, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_full_tqc_id, "Trust CAN" = m_full_tcan_id,
       "Attachment QC" = m_full_att_id, "Financial Sat" = m_full_fin_id),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - Full Sample (Individual FE Only)"
)
```

### ±10 Days Window (Individual FE)

```{r did-day20-10days-id-only}
m_10d_tqc_id <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                      data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_tcan_id <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                       data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_att_id <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                      data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)
m_10d_fin_id <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                      data = df_10d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_10d_tqc_id, "Trust CAN" = m_10d_tcan_id,
       "Attachment QC" = m_10d_att_id, "Financial Sat" = m_10d_fin_id),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±10 Days (Individual FE Only)"
)
```

### ±5 Days Window (Individual FE)

```{r did-day20-5days-id-only}
m_5d_tqc_id <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_tcan_id <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                      data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_att_id <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)
m_5d_fin_id <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_5d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_5d_tqc_id, "Trust CAN" = m_5d_tcan_id,
       "Attachment QC" = m_5d_att_id, "Financial Sat" = m_5d_fin_id),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±5 Days (Individual FE Only)"
)
```

### ±3 Days Window (Individual FE)

```{r did-day20-3days-id-only}
m_3d_tqc_id <- feols(trust_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_tcan_id <- feols(trust_can ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                      data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_att_id <- feols(attachment_qc ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)
m_3d_fin_id <- feols(financial_satisf ~ treated_child * post_20 | ID,
                     data = df_3d, cluster = ~ID)

modelsummary(
  list("Trust QC" = m_3d_tqc_id, "Trust CAN" = m_3d_tcan_id,
       "Attachment QC" = m_3d_att_id, "Financial Sat" = m_3d_fin_id),
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared.within"),
  title = "DiD: Child Benefit (Day 20) - ±3 Days (Individual FE Only)"
)
```

# Save Prepared Data

```{r save}
# Select key variables for analysis
df_analysis <- df %>%
  select(
    # Identifiers
    ID, wave, immigrant,
    # Outcomes (cleaned)
    trust_qc, trust_can, attachment_qc, financial_satisf,
    # Original outcomes (for reference)
    trust_qcgov, trust_cangov, attach_qc, current_financialsatisf,
    # Survey timing
    startdate, enddate, recordeddate,
    survey_date, day_of_month, month, year,
    # Proximity variables
    starts_with("prox_"),
    # Beneficiary variables
    starts_with("ben_"),
    selected_none,
    # Original benefit variables
    starts_with("mprog_"),
    # Demographics
    birthyear, gender, income, hhincome, education_cat
  )

cat("Analysis dataset:", nrow(df_analysis), "rows,", ncol(df_analysis), "columns\n")

# Quick check
cat("\nOutcome variable summary in analysis dataset:\n")
df_analysis %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    trust_qc_mean = mean(trust_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    trust_can_mean = mean(trust_can, na.rm = TRUE),
    attachment_qc_mean = mean(attachment_qc, na.rm = TRUE),
    financial_satisf_mean = mean(financial_satisf, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  kable(digits = 2)
```
